title: Staging Browser QA / Quran + Tafseer + Hadith Runtime Verification

autoChecks.title: Sprint 27.10 staging acceptance report exists and is accepted
Runtime env references staging-ilm-mate-v1 and avoids noor-cdn main

tasks.title: Settings page shows staging CDN runtime source
tasks.expected: Data mode is cdn / External CDN and CDN bases point to staging-ilm-mate-v1. Production remains blocked.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm the Data mode card and Sprint 27.10 acceptance card are visible.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Production guard remains visible
tasks.expected: Production CDN remains blocked and noor-cdn/main is not promoted.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm no card suggests production promotion is complete.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Quran Surah index loads from CDN
tasks.expected: Page says Runtime content source: cdn and displays the Surah index.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm it does not say mock fallback.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Quran Surah 001 opens from CDN
tasks.expected: Surah Al-Fatihah opens with ayat content from CDN.
tasks.evidenceHint: Check the first and last ayah render.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Quran Surah 114 opens from CDN
tasks.expected: Surah An-Nas opens with ayat content from CDN.
tasks.evidenceHint: Check a late Surah so we know the full 114-surah range is reachable.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Tafseer library loads from CDN
tasks.expected: Tafseer CDN library appears with selectable Tafseer sources/books.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm the page is not demo-only and shows CDN source/index information.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Tafseer sample source and Surah content can be opened
tasks.expected: At least one Tafseer source and Surah sample displays entries.
tasks.evidenceHint: Open a listed Tafseer item/source and verify text appears.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Hadith View by book is populated
tasks.expected: View by book count is greater than 0 and collections render.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm the by-book tab/list has content.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Hadith View by chapter is populated
tasks.expected: View by chapter count is greater than 0 and chapter collections render.
tasks.evidenceHint: Confirm this is no longer View by chapter (0).
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Hadith page has no duplicate React key console error
tasks.expected: Browser console has no duplicate key `all` warning/error.
tasks.evidenceHint: Open Chrome DevTools Console and refresh the page.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Explore uses external CDN search index
tasks.expected: Search source shows External CDN search index and returns results.
tasks.evidenceHint: Search “mercy” or “prayer”; confirm results are from CDN search.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: Hadith search duplicate behavior is observed and documented
tasks.expected: If the same canonical Hadith appears by book and by chapter, note it for Sprint 27.12 dedup/search refinement.
tasks.evidenceHint: This is observational; pass if behavior is documented even if future refinement is needed.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

tasks.title: No critical network or CORS errors during browser QA
tasks.expected: No repeated 404/CORS failures for manifest, Quran, Tafseer, Hadith, or search files.
tasks.evidenceHint: Refresh Settings, Quran, Tafseer, Hadith and Explore with DevTools open.
tasks.notes: Manual browser QA completed on localhost:3200 against staging CDN.

nextAction: Browser QA accepted for staging. Production CDN remains blocked until explicit promotion sprint.
